message:
feat(usage): add real-time rate limit tracking for smart rotation

Add a new `internal/usage` package that fetches real-time rate limit
utilization from Claude and Codex APIs:

- Claude: Uses https://api.anthropic.com/api/oauth/usage with
  anthropic-beta header, returns five_hour and seven_day windows
- Codex: Uses https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/wham/usage, returns
  primary_window and secondary_window with used_percent

New CLI command `caam limits [provider]`:
- Shows real-time rate limit usage across all profiles
- Calculates availability score (0-100) for rotation decisions
- Supports --best flag to show optimal profile for switching
- Supports --format json for scripting integration

Enhanced `caam next` command with --usage-aware flag:
- Fetches real-time usage data before profile selection
- Incorporates rate limit utilization into smart rotation scoring
- Profiles near their limits get penalty scores
- Profiles with low utilization get bonus scores

The rotation algorithm now considers:
1. Cooldown status (disqualifying)
2. Health status (token expiry)
3. Recency (prefer less recently used)
4. Real-time rate limit usage (NEW)
5. Random jitter for tie-breaking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
